name: BP407_HEIS
description:
The intent must consistently recognize user requests related to Home Serve, even when Automatic Speech Recognition (ASR) produces variations or misinterpretations. Currently, Lex is inconsistently resolving utterances such as “home serve,” which are being recognized as variations like “home surf,” “homeer,” “home so,” and “home soap,” causing valid requests to fall into fallback.

All these variations represent the same user intent and should map to the HEIS flow. The intent configuration must be enhanced to handle such phonetic and ASR-driven variations to ensure stable recognition and prevent valid utterances from incorrectly triggering fallback.
